package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for package_level_mutable_config_used_by_handlers_services: Mutable package globals used as live config in request paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule107NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule107NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule107NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario107Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule107NegativeService, input Rule107NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
